name: mostAsFsEnable, mostAsFsDisable
title: mostAsFsEnable, mostAsFsDisable
description: mostAsFsEnable() makes the function service available for the function block. The function block must be assigned to the CAPL program via mostApRegister(fblockID, instIDDefault) or the database. Furthermore mostAsFsEnable() enables the functions <FktIDs>, <Notification> and <NotificationCheck> of the function block for the notification service.
